meta.description: A single step in an operational runbook.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_13b2a8c9_667a_4442_84ad_cb28e4c8824a" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "title" TEXT,
    "instructions" TEXT,
    "expected_outcome" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_13b2a8c9_667a_4442_84ad_cb28e4c8824a" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_13b2a8c9667a4442_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
